title: pavetta paupercula
intro: Pavetta paupercula, also known as the Poor Man's Pavetta, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and other infectious diseases. The medicinal properties of Pavetta paupercula are attributed to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which provide various health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and preventing infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Pavetta paupercula are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions.
